name: SilhouetteType
summary: Enumerates the different types of silhouettes and their origins.

enum_values.name: Projecting
enum_values.summary: Boundary of a region that projects to a curve. The view direction is tangent to the surface over the entire region.

enum_values.name: TangentProjects
enum_values.summary: Tangent silhouette curve where the curve projects to a point (within tolerance). In this case side_fill[i] is meaningless so it's left unset.

enum_values.name: Tangent
enum_values.summary: Tangent silhouette curve. The view direction is tangent to the surface along the curve.

enum_values.name: Crease
enum_values.summary: Crease on geometry that is a silhouette.

enum_values.name: Boundary
enum_values.summary: Boundary of geometry is always a silhouette.

enum_values.name: NonSilhouetteCrease
enum_values.summary: A non-silhouette crease, meaning both sides are visible.

enum_values.name: NonSilhouetteTangent
enum_values.summary: A non-silhouette tangent edge that is not a crease.

enum_values.name: DraftCurve
enum_values.summary: Draft curve is a curve of constant draft angle.
